_phase: Both Implementation Phase 1 and Implementation Phase 2 - Implementation Phase 1 uses in-memory Dictionary, Implementation Phase 2 uses PostgreSQL

server.name: finwise-orchestrator-mcp-server
server.description: FinWise multi-agent investment advisor - orchestrates user profile management and investment recommendations through specialized agents. Implementation Phase 1: in-memory profiles. Implementation Phase 2: persistent PostgreSQL profiles.

tools.name: get_investment_recommendations
tools.description: Get personalized investment recommendations based on user profile (risk tolerance, goals, timeframe). Routes through orchestrator to User Profile Agent and Global Advisor Agent. Returns generic stock vs. real estate guidance in v0.1 (hollow implementation).

query.description: Natural language query about investment advice (e.g., 'Should I invest in stocks or real estate?', 'What investments match my risk tolerance?')

user_identifier.description: Unique user identifier from AI assistant (e.g., Claude user ID, ChatGPT user ID). Used to retrieve or create user profile.

include_reasoning.description: If true, include agent routing decisions and handoff reasoning in response (for debugging/transparency)

recommendation.description: Investment advice from Global Advisor Agent (hollow: generic stock vs. real estate guidance)

user_profile_summary.description: Summary of user profile used for recommendations

agent_workflow.description: Sequence of agents invoked (if include_reasoning=true). Observed from framework's WorkflowEvent stream.

request_id.description: Unique request ID for this MCP tool invocation (for logging/tracing)

errors.message: User profile not found. Please create a profile first using update_user_profile.
errors.details: No profile exists for user_identifier. User Profile Agent will prompt for basic information.

errors.message: Unable to generate investment recommendations at this time.
errors.details: Global Advisor Agent failed to generate advice (LLM service error or timeout).

errors.message: Investment recommendation request timed out after 10 seconds.
errors.details: Multi-agent workflow exceeded performance target (v0.1 target: <10s).

tools.name: update_user_profile
tools.description: Create or update user investment profile (risk tolerance, goals, timeframe). Routes to User Profile Agent which interacts with user to collect questionnaire data. Persists to PostgreSQL via User Profile MCP Server.

user_identifier.description: Unique user identifier from AI assistant

investment_goals.description: User's investment objectives as free-form text (1-500 characters)

message.description: Success message from User Profile Agent (e.g., 'Profile created successfully', 'Profile updated')

errors.details: Risk tolerance, goals, or timeframe values do not meet validation rules (e.g., Aggressive + ShortTerm warning).

errors.message: Profile was modified by another request. Please retry.
errors.details: Optimistic concurrency conflict - version mismatch during update.

errors.message: Unable to save user profile at this time.
errors.details: User Profile MCP Server failed to write to PostgreSQL.

tools.name: get_conversation_history
tools.description: DEFERRED TO v0.3+: Retrieve conversation history. In v0.1, each MCP tool invocation is stateless - no persistent conversation history. Framework manages message flow during workflow execution only. v0.3+ will add a new MCP Server for conversation persistence in Azure Cosmos DB (embeddings, vectors, RAG).

request_id.description: Request ID from previous get_investment_recommendations response (v0.1: not implemented)

message.const: Conversation history persistence deferred to v0.3+. Each tool invocation is stateless in v0.1.

errors.message: Conversation history feature not available in v0.1.
errors.details: Each MCP tool call is stateless. Persistent conversation history planned for v0.3+ with new Cosmos DB MCP Server.

prompts.name: investment_advice_prompt
prompts.description: Example prompt for getting investment recommendations
prompts.template: I need investment advice. My risk tolerance is {risk_tolerance}, I'm investing for {goals}, and my timeframe is {timeframe}. What should I invest in?
